'''Nrross''' was a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] hired by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Naz Felyood]] of the ship ''[[Jynni's Virtue]]''. He served as added intimidation and a yes-man to the captain.

When ''Jynni's Virtue'' came under fire from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] scout patrol, a desperate leap to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] destroyed the ship's [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]]. The explosion killed Nrross, despite the Trandoshan's natural regenerative abilities.
